pull_request.title: Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates: | Package | From | To | | --- | --- | --- | | [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.76.4` | `8.77.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.30.0` | `3.31.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.30.1` | `3.31.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.30.1` | `2.31.0` | | [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.7.2` | `0.7.3` | | [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.34.0` | `6.35.0` | Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.76.4 to 8.77.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

8.77.0

What's Changed

  • CopyValue: process all matching YAML files, not just the first by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7099
  • Support variable references in multi-component Gradle dependency declarations by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#7095
  • C#: Add declarative RewriteRule combinator by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7106
  • Add CopyValue recipe for .properties files by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#7097
  • Fix JavaTemplate expression replacement inside return statements by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7096
  • C#: Wire up capture constraint evaluation in pattern matching by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7109
  • C#: Fix indentation of flattened multi-statement template blocks by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7110
  • C#: Add IRewriteRule.ToVisitor() with fast-reject pattern matching by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7111
  • Fix AddSettingsPluginRepository duplicate pluginManagement when not first statement by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#7105
  • Docker: Add new EOL image entries and update existing data by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7108
  • C#: Add Find() annotator overload and ToFindVisitor() to CSharpPattern by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7115
  • C#: Support variadic captures in attribute pattern matching and templates by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7114
  • Python: fix type attribution for identifiers in method invocations by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7119
  • Gradle: fix GradleJavaTemplateTest by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7118
  • C#: Simplify IRewriteRule API by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7120
  • C#: Enforce typed capture constraints at pattern matching time by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7117
  • C#: Fix typed capture constraints for generic interfaces and primitives by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7122
  • C#: Support open generic type parameters in typed captures by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7124
  • Fix JavaTemplate statement replacement regression for non-J.Block parent cursors by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7123
  • C#: Fix typed capture type resolution and improve type system by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7126
  • Add Proxy/Proxies data model to MavenSettings by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7092
  • Add visitArrayAccess to JavaPrinter for marker rendering by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#7129
  • Fix unchanged Quark files appearing in changeset results by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#7130
  • C#: Use safe pattern-match in CSharpVisitor for VisitExpression/VisitStatement by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7133
  • Continue refinements of AddSettingsPluginRepository by @​shanman190 in openrewrite/rewrite#7132
  • C#: Replace RewriteRule with CSharpTemplate.Rewrite() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#7134
  • Toml: Fix comment handling in DeleteKey by @​greg-at-moderne in openrewrite/rewrite#7121

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.76.2...v8.77.0

Commits
  • 8802960 Fix comment handling in DeleteKey (#7121)
  • 035e067 Extract documentation examples from tests
  • 0a86c8b C#: Remove visitStatement from VisitLambda to match Java
  • a056143 C#: Replace IRewriteRule/RewriteRule with CSharpTemplate.Rewrite() (#7134)
  • 519950d Continue refinements of AddPluginRepository (#7132)
  • 81927dc C#: Visit prefix/markers before VisitExpression/VisitStatement, matching Java
  • aecb4b4 C#: Use safe pattern-match in CSharpVisitor for VisitExpression/VisitStatemen...
  • 48d403b Fix unchanged Quark files appearing in changeset results (#7130)
  • 89ee6c9 Add visitArrayAccess to JavaPrinter for SearchResult marker rendering (#7129)
  • 18d7e9a Add Proxy/Proxies data model to MavenSettings (#7092)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks` from 3.30.0 to 3.31.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks's releases.

3.31.0

What's Changed

  • Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement crash on TypeCast arguments by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#933
  • Functions annotated with TestFactory must return a value hence must be ignored by TestMethodsShouldBeVoid recipe by @​barbulescu in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#935
  • Fix empty setUp/tearDown generation and missing public modifier for JUnit 4 by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#936
  • Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement cursor chain for JavaTemplate compatibility by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#938
  • Convert ArgumentMatcher anonymous class to lambda in Mockito migration by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#937
  • Add apiguardian-api to annotation processor classpath by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#939
  • Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency when MockitoExtension is introduced by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#941
  • Add PowerMockRunnerDelegateToRunWith recipe by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#940

New Contributors

  • @​barbulescu made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks#935

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks/compare/v3.30.0...v3.31.0

Commits
  • b15c883 Extract documentation examples from tests
  • f00b917 Add PowerMockRunnerDelegateToRunWith recipe (#940)
  • fc88d78 Add mockito-junit-jupiter dependency when MockitoExtension is introduced (#941)
  • 259e4c9 Add apiguardian-api to annotation processor classpath to suppress warnings (#...
  • 9f7bb0e Convert ArgumentMatcher anonymous class to lambda in Mockito migration (#937)
  • 72438fc Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement cursor chain for JavaTemplate compatibility (...
  • dedddc9 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • f737da5 Fix empty setUp/tearDown generation and missing public modifier for JUnit 4 (...
  • 014300f functions annotated with TestFactory must return a value hence must be ignore...
  • cad9d19 Fix AssertThrowsOnLastStatement crash on TypeCast arguments (#933)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java` from 3.30.1 to 3.31.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java's releases.

3.31.0

What's Changed

  • Modernize README to reflect current project capabilities by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1020
  • Add UseTryWithResources to Java 11 migration recipe by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1022
  • Add ExplicitTypeToVar recipe to replace explicit type with var keyword. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1009
  • Fix IBMSemeruTest for updated ChangeType wildcard import handling by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1026
  • Extend UseVarForPrimitive to support String literals by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1024
  • Add notes for Faces 4.0 FacesManagedBeansRemoved by @​evie-lau in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1025
  • Fix order for ManagedProperty migration in Faces 4.0 by @​evie-lau in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1027
  • Add javax/jakarta.enterprise.concurrent-api migration for EE9 by @​evie-lau in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1028
  • Add Java best practices recipe by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1021
  • Add JavadocToMarkdownDocComment recipe (JEP 467) by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1019

New Contributors

  • @​motlin made their first contribution in openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java#1009

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java/compare/v3.30.1...v3.31.0

Commits
  • f3a2e32 Extract documentation examples from tests
  • e339177 Add JavadocToMarkdownDocComment recipe (JEP 467) (#1019)
  • fd3bfe3 Add Java best practices recipe (#1021)
  • 1c2d0ce OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • a9e4663 Add javax/jakarta.enterprise.concurrent-api migration for EE9 (#1028)
  • 028d886 Fix order for ManagedProperty migration in Faces 4.0 (#1027)
  • 8ff2f5b Add notes for Faces 4.0 FacesManagedBeansRemoved (#1025)
  • 69aeb40 Extend UseVarForPrimitive to support String literals (#1024)
  • 68f9289 Fix IBMSemeruTest to match updated ChangeType wildcard import removal (#1026)
  • e663e7b Use var for local variables initialized with constructor in tests
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis` from 2.30.1 to 2.31.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis's releases.

2.31.0

What's Changed

  • Add InterruptedExceptionHandling recipe (RSPEC-S2142) by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#838
  • Add ExplicitThis recipe to make this. prefix explicit. by @​motlin in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#791
  • SimplifyBooleanExpression: skip nullable boolean comparisons in Kotlin by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis#839

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis/compare/v2.30.1...v2.31.0

Commits
  • c82f961 SimplifyBooleanExpression: skip nullable boolean comparisons in Kotlin (#839)
  • 879b179 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • 5d7e7b1 Add ExplicitThis recipe to make this. prefix explicit. (#791)
  • 3b9b037 Add InterruptedExceptionHandling recipe (RSPEC-S2142) (#838)
  • See full diff in compare view

Updates `org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin` from 6.34.0 to 6.35.0
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin's releases.

6.35.0

What's Changed

  • Add optional version input to publish workflow by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1124
  • Use CsvDataTableStore for data table export by @​jkschneider in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1125
  • chore(ci): bump com.fasterxml.jackson:jackson-bom from 2.17.3 to 2.21.2 by @​dependabot[bot] in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1126
  • Load proxy settings from Maven settings.xml by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin#1127

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin/compare/v6.34.0...v6.35.0

Commits
  • 4dcaf3b [maven-release-plugin] prepare release v6.35.0
  • 0db8a11 Bump rewrite.version property
  • f06cf1c Load proxy settings from Maven settings.xml (#1127)
  • c6551ed Bump rewrite.version property
  • 102be49 chore(ci): bump com.fasterxml.jackson:jackson-bom from 2.17.3 to 2.21.2 (#1126)
  • d3d5e9e OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • f33cd26 Use CsvDataTableStore for data table export (#1125)
  • 1c13c14 OpenRewrite recipe best practices
  • 86e7d1c Add optional version input to publish workflow (#1124)
  • 3611355 Bump rewrite.version property
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

You can trigger a rebase of this PR by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---

                     </dependencies>
                 </plugin>

commit_summaries.message:
Bump the openrewrite group with 6 updates

Bumps the openrewrite group with 6 updates:

| Package | From | To |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite) | `8.76.4` | `8.77.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-testing-frameworks](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-testing-frameworks) | `3.30.0` | `3.31.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-migrate-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-migrate-java) | `3.30.1` | `3.31.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-static-analysis](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-static-analysis) | `2.30.1` | `2.31.0` |
| [org.openrewrite.recipe:rewrite-joda](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-joda) | `0.7.2` | `0.7.3` |
| [org.openrewrite.maven:rewrite-maven-plugin](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite-maven-plugin) | `6.34.0` | `6.35.0` |
